summary: Full backend + frontend testing of client_phone + Cita Flotante + rowSpan en vista semanal. 7/7 backend tests pass. All UI flows pass: login PIN 0000 + Centro -> /agenda; modal-client-phone-input presente y funcional; header-floating-btn abre FloatingAppointmentModal con todos los campos (specialist, servicio texto libre, cliente, teléfono, fecha, hora, chips 15/30/45/60/90 + custom); creación de flotante a las 10:30 solapando regular 10:00-10:45 GUARDA sin 409 (verificado 2 floating badges en grid); card flotante muestra border-sky-700 + bg-sky-50 + border-dashed + badge FLOTANTE + nombre del servicio (Cejas rápidas); AppointmentDetailModal para flotante muestra TIPO=FLOTANTE y detail-phone con <a href='tel:...'>; /semana renderiza rowSpan=2 para citas >60 min (Roberto Silva 11:30-12:30, Patricia López 14:00-15:30 tinte 90min), muestra servicio + cliente + especialista, y badge FLOT para flotantes. Backend validation: POST /api/appointments con is_floating=true sin custom_service_name O sin custom_duration_minutes -> 400. Regular overlapping -> 409. Skip conflict para is_floating=true -> 200.

issues: React hydration warning in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by Emergent build instrumentation wrapping dynamic text ({s.name}) inside option with a <span> wrapper. Cosmetic only - dropdown works correctly. Same pattern as NewAppointmentModal.jsx. Consider making option children a single JSX expression (e.g., template-literal string) to suppress.

action_items: (Optional) Suppress hydration warning for <option> children in FloatingAppointmentModal.jsx line 112 - pure cosmetic.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py create_appointment correctly branches on is_floating (skips service_id lookup, requires custom_service_name+custom_duration_minutes, forces is_overbooked=True, skips conflict check). Good separation.
WeeklyAgenda.jsx uses rowSpan based on duration_minutes/60 - verified rowSpan=2 for 60min+ citas; covered cells null for rowSpan to work.
AppointmentDetailModal conditionally renders detail-phone only if client_phone present, tel: href correctly escapes the number.
FloatingAppointmentModal uses free-text for servicio (no catálogo dependency) + chips 15/30/45/60/90 + custom numeric input - matches PRD.

Clients collection is still upserted by phone on floating creation (server.py line 363), which may be undesired for walk-in/one-off floating clients - consider flag to skip client upsert for floating.
test_credentials: PIN: 0000. Sucursal Centro tiene 2 specialists (Sofía Vargas, Lucía Martín).
seed_data_creation: Created during Playwright run: 1 floating 'TEST_PW_Flot / TEST_SvcLibre_PW' at 10:30, 1 regular 'TEST_PW_Regular' (phone 5557778899) on today. Backend tests self-cleaned their TEST_ data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login is via on-screen PIN keypad (click button '0' four times, then click INGRESAR on branch card). FloatingAppointmentModal testids are prefixed 'floating-*' (not 'modal-*'). Regular modal phone is 'modal-client-phone-input'. Floating grid card has data-testid 'floating-badge-{id}' inside 'appointment-card-{id}'. Week view testid 'week-appt-{id}'; rowSpan is on parent <td> not the card. Seed has a pre-created floating 'Cliente Flotante / Cejas rápidas' at 10:30-11:00 for Sofía.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. Only minor: Emergent x-source instrumentation wraps {s.name} inside <option> with a <span>, triggering a React hydration warning. Mitigation: none required (functional). If desired, force flat string: <option>{String(s.name)}</option> or `${s.name}` template literal to collapse the dev-mode wrapper.
